content: My father, Shri Anil Chatterjee, was in poor health since 2016. On 12/03/2017, he called me, my sister Sunita, and our neighbor Mrs. Anjali Ghosh to his residence. He declared he wished to leave the entire property to me, as Sunita had shown no interest in farming and I had taken care of his medical expenses. He signed the will in front of us all. The document was notarized the same day by Notary P. K. Banerjee, whose seal is on the document. I withdrew ₹5 lakh from my father’s account on 11/03/2017 to pay legal fees for drafting the will. The land revenue record was updated in 2016 because my father had already decided to make me the sole heir. I never had any motive to forge anything. I was deeply attached to my father and cared for him until his death. I have no idea why Sunita is accusing me. As for the boundary stones — they were placed according to the original survey. The satellite images she refers to are outdated. I did not bribe anyone. I am the rightful heir.
